sections.title: Compliance Checklist
sections.contentHtml:
All items below represent direct platform obligations. Items relating to agent, notario, or individual party obligations have been excluded.

AreaVerification Step
FrequencyJECVEBR License
Verify active license via PCS portal. Confirm $10,000 bond current. Check sponsoring broker for salespersons.On agent onboarding
Stellar MLS AgreementConfirm platform/vendor named in Stellar MLS / PRAR IDX agreement.
Annual / on changeAgent Training Gate
Confirm new agents have completed Stellar MLS required training before allowing listing submission.Per new agent
Broker AttributionListing firm name + phone/email on every PDP and thumbnail.
Weekly spot-checkBuyer Comp Filter
All compensation data stripped from all displays and search results.Daily automated
Listing PurgeExpired and Withdrawn listings removed within 24 hours.
Daily automatediMapp / Data Co-op Block
iMapp and Data Co-op tools not surfaced for any PR-address listing.Platform config
VOW GateRegistration wall active. Email verified before sold data accessed. TOU accepted. Audit logs maintained.
Monthly testCCP Monitoring
Flag any listing publicly marketed before Stellar MLS entry. Enforce 5-business-day PR entry window.Per listing
DMEL ConsentOwners Exclusion Form on file and uploaded within 24hr before DMEL status applied.
Per DMEL listingZillow LAS Flag
Flag listings marketed publicly without corresponding Stellar MLS entry within 1 business day.Per listing
FinCEN RRE ScreeningScreen buyer entity type and financing method. Flag entity/trust + non-financed = reportable. Alert notario.
Per transactionFinCEN Log Retention
Log all transaction screenings and outcomes for 5 years.Ongoing
CRIM Lien CheckConfirm no unpaid CRIM taxes (Estado de Cuenta) before listing goes active or under contract.
Per listing / per transactionSTR PRTC Verification
Verify PRTC Innkeeper ID before publishing STR listing. Display ID on listing.Per STR listing
STR Room Tax DisclosureDisclose 7% room tax on all STR listings under 90 nights. Surface host remittance obligation for non-Airbnb bookings.
Per STR listingSTR Duration Flag
Listings offering 90+ day rentals flagged as long-term rental — STR compliance workflow does not apply.Per listing
Fair Housing Algorithm AuditAudit search ranking and recommendation algorithms for all PR protected classes including political ideology, social condition, source of income.
AnnualListing Content Screen
Screen listing text for discriminatory language. Flag any stated preferences on protected class basis.Per listing
Rental Filter ComplianceConfirm no source-of-income filter available in rental search. No 'no housing vouchers' language permitted.
QuarterlyWCAG Audit (English + Spanish)
Annual manual screen-reader audit in both English and Spanish.Annual
CAN-SPAM UnsubscribeConfirm unsubscribe mechanism present in all commercial emails. Honor opt-outs within 10 business days.
Per campaignGPC Signal
Honor Global Privacy Control as opt-out for California users.Platform config
Privacy NoticeCurrent privacy policy published covering all data collection, use, and user rights.
Annual reviewNon-Disclosure Flag
Puerto Rico is a full disclosure jurisdiction. Confirm no non-disclosure restrictions applied to any PR sold price data.Platform config
